Headline: #95/95th Temporary Westbound Reroute near 95th/Bishop
ShortDescription: Westbound #95/95th buses are temporarily rerouted due to, police activity near 95th/Bishop.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Westbound #95/95th buses are temporarily rerouted via 95th, Vincennes, 99th, Beverly, and 95th due to police activity near 95th/Bishop.

Eastbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.
